title: Job Openings at Polaris Digitech Limited
content:
Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software, and decision support services to fulfill its clients’ strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Address Verification Field Agent

Job Locations: Edo, Katsina, Kwara, Lagos, Ogun, Oyo, and Rivers
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for agents within the states listed who will carry out address verification from banks and fintech within their locations in each state.
	The ideal candidate must have a functional Android phone and will have good knowledge of Google Maps.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with years of work experience.


Note: Applicants can apply from the following areas:

Lagos State:
Alimosho, Ikorodu, Ojo, Badagry, Surulere, Mushin, Apapa, Epe, Yaba, Lekki, Ajah, Ijanikin, Okokomaiko, Alaba International Market, Igbogbo, Odogunyan, Gberigbe, Elepe, Ijede, Imota, Ikotun, Egbeda, Ayobo, Iyana Ipaja, Akowonjo, Abesan, Ijegun, Idimu, Isheri, Igando, Ijora, Abaranje, Aboru, Akesan, Alakuko, Baruwa, Ejigbo, Ipaja, Kosofe, Lagos Mainland, Mangoro, Meiran, Ahmadiya, Oja Agbo, Iyana Ogun, Okobaale, Ikate, Oke Odo, Agbado, Amuwo Odofin, Ilasa, Ikola.

Ogun State:
Abeokuta, Sagamu, Ijebu Ode, Ota, Ifo, Agbara, Mowe, Ibafo, Idiroko, Ijoko, Owode, Matogun, Ogijo, Odogbolu, Ode Remo, Oke Oko, Ishara, Ikenne, Mosinmi, Ntabo, Aro Ogun, Onirugba, Yakoyo, Elejigbo, Ope Ilu, Idi Egun, Olomore, Ilisan, Oke Aro, Iyesi, Aiyetoro, Ifaki Ijaye.

Other Eligible States:
Kwara, Oyo, Rivers, Edo, Delta, Taraba, and Katsina.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Optical Manager",
  "description": "Eye Foundation Hospital (Operated by Summit Healthcare Hospital Ltd) is the leading eye care hospital in Nigeria with a vision to eliminate avoidable blindness in Nigeria and Africa. For over three decades, we have been at the forefront of delivering excellent and quality eye care through a network of primary, secondary, and tertiary eye care centers across Nigeria. We are a one-stop-shop for eye care with a wide range of comprehensive services of international standards offered by well-trained professionals with state-of-the-art equipment and environment. Renowned for our unwavering dedication and commitment to quality, we take pride in our esteemed reputation as a trusted and reputable healthcare institution.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Optical Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Report To: Optical Services Country Manager

Job Summary


	The Optical Manager is responsible for the operation of the store, keeping the store profitable and well-organized to ensure a pleasing experience for our customers.
	In addition, the Optical Manager delivers excellence in sales performance.


Responsibilities
Your duties shall include, but are not limited to the following:


	Supervise and coordinate all customer-related activities.
	Drive the delivery of quality care to patients.
	Generates sales report.
	You are required to visit other branches as the need arises.
	Entering the optical daily sales of all branches in QuickBooks.
	Prepare monthly sales reports with the line manager at the end of the month.
	Reconciliation of invoices from various optical labs with the order placed and receipts at the end of the month.
	Assisting the optometrist in attending to patients.
	Assisting patients in choosing frames and lens options.
	Stock reconciliation at the end of the month.
	Follow up on glasses ordered from the laboratory.
	Ordering and collection of contact lenses when needed.
	Preparation of HMO report at the end of the month for the accounting and audit department.
	General administrative work in the optical department.
	Receiving and assisting patients in accessing the appropriate optical services.
	Providing effective clerical services and also attending to phone calls.
	Any other duties as assigned by your supervisor and Management.


Qualifications


	A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in any relevant field, especially in Humanities and Social Sciences with a&nbsp;minimum of 2 years of working experience in a relevant field.
	Prior customer service experience is an added advantage.
	Must be computer savvy.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@eyefoundationhospital.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-11",

Optical Manager Job at the Eye Foundation Hospital




        
    

        
        Eye Foundation Hospital (Operated by Summit Healthcare Hospital Ltd) is the leading eye care hospital in Nigeria with a vision to eliminate avoidable blindness in Nigeria and Africa. For over three decades, we have been at the forefront of delivering excellent and quality eye care through a network of primary, secondary, and tertiary eye care centers across Nigeria. We are a one-stop-shop for eye care with a wide range of comprehensive services of international standards offered by well-trained professionals with state-of-the-art equipment and environment. Renowned for our unwavering dedication and commitment to quality, we take pride in our esteemed reputation as a trusted and reputable healthcare institution.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Optical Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Report To: Optical Services Country Manager

Job Summary


	The Optical Manager is responsible for the operation of the store, keeping the store profitable and well-organized to ensure a pleasing experience for our customers.
	In addition, the Optical Manager delivers excellence in sales performance.


Responsibilities
Your duties shall include, but are not limited to the following:


	Supervise and coordinate all customer-related activities.
	Drive the delivery of quality care to patients.
	Generates sales report.
	You are required to visit other branches as the need arises.
	Entering the optical daily sales of all branches in QuickBooks.
	Prepare monthly sales reports with the line manager at the end of the month.
	Reconciliation of invoices from various optical labs with the order placed and receipts at the end of the month.
	Assisting the optometrist in attending to patients.
	Assisting patients in choosing frames and lens options.
	Stock reconciliation at the end of the month.
	Follow up on glasses ordered from the laboratory.
	Ordering and collection of contact lenses when needed.
	Preparation of HMO report at the end of the month for the accounting and audit department.
	General administrative work in the optical department.
	Receiving and assisting patients in accessing the appropriate optical services.
	Providing effective clerical services and also attending to phone calls.
	Any other duties as assigned by your supervisor and Management.


Qualifications


	A Bachelor's Degree in any relevant field, especially in Humanities and Social Sciences with a minimum of 2 years of working experience in a relevant field.
	Prior customer service experience is an added advantage.
	Must be computer savvy.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Banker",
  "description": "Stanbic IBTC Bank is a leading African banking group focused on emerging markets globally. It has been a mainstay of South Africa&#39;s financial system for 150 years, and now spans 16 countries across the African continent.

Standard Bank is a firm believer in technical innovation, to help us guarantee exceptional client service and leading edge financial solutions. Our growing global success reflects our commitment to the latest solutions, the best people, and a uniquely flexible and vibrant working culture. To help us drive our success into the future, we are looking for resourceful individuals to join our dedicated team at our offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Personal Banker

Job Ref ID:&nbsp;80401554A-0001
Job Location: Asaba, Delta&nbsp;
Job Type: Full-time
Business Segment: Personal &amp; Private Banking

Job Description


	To proactively manage a portfolio of retail clients by providing comprehensive, relationship-based banking solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Establish, build and strengthen relationships with customers, based on mutual respect, to retain customers and gain word-of-mouth referrals.
	Ensure that customers are well informed with regards to lending application processes (e.g. vehicle finance, home loans, overdraft, credit card, personal loans, etc), credit maintenance processes (e.g. annual reviews) and account conduct expectations (e.g. minimum account balances, provision for debit orders and cheque payments, etc).
	Conduct a needs analysis with all new and existing customers to ensure that product opportunities identified are appropriate to meet the customer&rsquo;s needs and priorities.
	Pro-actively identify cross-sell opportunities within own portfolio of customers to maximise life cycle opportunities.
	Pro-actively manage the portfolio to maximise revenue for the Bank (referring to fees, margins and sales), minimise costs and risks, whilst maintaining and entrenching the customer&rsquo;s relationship with the Bank appropriately.


Qualifications


	University Degree


Experience Required


	At least 3 years of experience in Personal and Private Banking.
	Knowledge of the bank&#39;s products, compliance procedures and regulations governing the management of financial services. Previous branch banking experience.


Additional Information
Behavioural Competencies:


	Articulating Information
	Embracing Change
	Establishing Rapport
	Following Procedures
	Managing Tasks
	Meeting Timescales
	Producing Output
	Seizing Opportunities
	Showing Composure
	Team Working
	Upholding Standards
	Valuing Individuals


Technical Competencies:


	Active Listening
	Banking Process &amp; Procedures
	Customer Understanding ( Consumer Banking)
	Product and Services Knowledge
	Product Knowledge (Consumer Banking)
	Risk Identification.
",

Personal Banker Job at Stanbic IBTC Bank




        
    

        
        Stanbic IBTC Bank is a leading African banking group focused on emerging markets globally. It has been a mainstay of South Africa's financial system for 150 years, and now spans 16 countries across the African continent.

Standard Bank is a firm believer in technical innovation, to help us guarantee exceptional client service and leading edge financial solutions. Our growing global success reflects our commitment to the latest solutions, the best people, and a uniquely flexible and vibrant working culture. To help us drive our success into the future, we are looking for resourceful individuals to join our dedicated team at our offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Banker
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Ref ID: 80401554A-0001
Job Location: Asaba, Delta 
Job Type: Full-time
Business Segment: Personal & Private Banking

Job Description


	To proactively manage a portfolio of retail clients by providing comprehensive, relationship-based banking solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Establish, build and strengthen relationships with customers, based on mutual respect, to retain customers and gain word-of-mouth referrals.
	Ensure that customers are well informed with regards to lending application processes (e.g. vehicle finance, home loans, overdraft, credit card, personal loans, etc), credit maintenance processes (e.g. annual reviews) and account conduct expectations (e.g. minimum account balances, provision for debit orders and cheque payments, etc).
	Conduct a needs analysis with all new and existing customers to ensure that product opportunities identified are appropriate to meet the customer’s needs and priorities.
	Pro-actively identify cross-sell opportunities within own portfolio of customers to maximise life cycle opportunities.
	Pro-actively manage the portfolio to maximise revenue for the Bank (referring to fees, margins and sales), minimise costs and risks, whilst maintaining and entrenching the customer’s relationship with the Bank appropriately.


Qualifications


	University Degree


Experience Required


	At least 3 years of experience in Personal and Private Banking.
	Knowledge of the bank's products, compliance procedures and regulations governing the management of financial services. Previous branch banking experience.


Additional Information
Behavioural Competencies:


	Articulating Information
	Embracing Change
	Establishing Rapport
	Following Procedures
	Managing Tasks
	Meeting Timescales
	Producing Output
	Seizing Opportunities
	Showing Composure
	Team Working
	Upholding Standards
	Valuing Individuals


Technical Competencies:


	Active Listening
	Banking Process & Procedures
	Customer Understanding ( Consumer Banking)
	Product and Services Knowledge
	Product Knowledge (Consumer Banking)
	Risk Identification.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Jotani Living
content:
Jotani Living is a hospitality and lifestyle brand committed to providing exceptional guest experiences through luxury accommodation, fine dining, and premium service delivery. We pride ourselves on blending comfort, elegance, and professionalism to create a welcoming environment for our guests.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Chief Finance Officer

Job Location: Ajao Estate, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director / CEO

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to provide strategic financial leadership and drive profitability, compliance, and operational efficiency within a fast-growing wine and beverage distribution company.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead financial strategy, budgeting, and forecasting.
	Manage cash flow, working capital, and banking relationships.
	Oversee financial reporting, internal controls, and audits.
	Ensure tax and regulatory compliance (FIRS, VAT, PAYE, etc.).
	Drive cost optimization and profitability across operations.
	Monitor inventory, supply chain finance, and loss control.
	Lead ERP improvements and financial data analytics.
	Build and manage a high-performing finance team.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	10–15 years of experience, with at least 5 years in a senior finance role.
	Professional certification (ACA, ACCA, or CFA) is required.
	Strong experience in FMCG, beverage, or distribution industry.
	Solid knowledge of Nigerian tax and regulatory environment.


Salary
N1,500,000 – N1,800,000 Gross Monthly.

Application Closing Date: 10th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton  as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Human Resource Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Human Resources
Reports To: General Manager / Director

Job Summary


	The Human Resources Manager is responsible for overseeing all HR functions, including recruitment, employee relations, performance management, training, and policy implementation.
	The role ensures alignment of HR strategies with business objectives and fosters a productive and compliant work environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies and initiatives aligned with company goals
	Oversee recruitment, selection, and onboarding processes
	Manage employee relations and resolve workplace issues effectively
	Supervise and guide the HR team
	Lead performance management and appraisal systems
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
	Design and implement training and development programs
	Manage compensation, benefits, and payroll processes
	Maintain and improve HR systems, policies, and procedures
	Provide HR reports and strategic insights to management


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	4–7 years of experience in HR, with at least 2 years in a managerial role
	Strong knowledge of HR best practices and labor laws
	Proven leadership and team management skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making ability
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR software
	Proximity to Lekki will be highly considered
	Professional certification (e.g., CIPM, SHRM, HRCI) is an added advantage


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 Monthly

Application Closing Date: 10th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email

 

 

3.) Spa Therapist

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and professional Spa Therapist to provide high-quality wellness and beauty treatments to clients.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about customer service, knowledgeable in various spa treatments, and able to create a relaxing and rejuvenating experience for clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform a variety of spa treatments including massages, facials, body scrubs, and waxing
	Assess clients’ needs and recommend appropriate treatments
	Maintain cleanliness and hygiene of treatment rooms and spa equipment
	Ensure clients are comfortable and satisfied before, during, and after treatments
	Handle client bookings and maintain accurate treatment records
	Promote and upsell spa services and products
	Follow all health and safety regulations


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Spa Therapist or similar role
	Certification in massage therapy, beauty therapy, or related field
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Ability to work long hours (10am–10pm)
	Knowledge of different massage techniques and skincare treatments.


Salary
N150000 Monthly.

Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail

     

    

        Click here to Apply
